items.title: House Committee Wants Goldman Sachs General Counsel to Testify on Epstein
items.description: Oversight Committee chair sent a letter to Kathryn Ruemmler on Tuesday citing its continuing investigation

items.title: Goldman Sachs Predicts AI Will Eventually Displace 6% of U.S. Workers
items.description: Companies that discussed artificial intelligence’s impact on jobs in the fourth quarter cut their job openings by 12% in 2025, compared with 8% for all companies, according to a Goldman Sachs research report Tuesday analyzing last quarter’s results and management commentary.  The trend suggests “there could be a nascent reluctance to hire in anticipation of potential productivity gains,” analysts said.  Goldman predicts AI will eventually displace 11 million jobs—about 6% of U.S. workers.

items.title: Epstein files: Goldman Sachs' Ruemmler, Bill Gates, Leon Black will testify to House panel
items.description: Kathryn Ruemmler said last month she would leave Goldman Sachs at the end of June after fallout over her emails with Jeffrey Epstein.

items.title: Goldman Sachs (GS) Could Be a Great Choice
items.description: Dividends are one of the best benefits to being a shareholder, but finding a great dividend stock is no easy task. Does Goldman (GS) have what it takes? Let's find out.

items.title: Goldman Sachs Shares Rise 4% After Key Trading Signal
items.description: A key trading signal flashed for Goldman Sachs shares at a price of $833.42, after which GS rose over 4% to an intraday high.
